zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck於1077年8月9日出生在比利時盧布格時，他的父親Hermann Ier de Luxembourg36歲，母親Sophia von Formbach21歲。他於大約1115年與Gertrud von Northeim結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1150年3月11日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck于1077年8月9日出生在比利时盧布格时，他的父亲Hermann Ier de Luxembourg36岁，母亲Sophia von Formbach21岁。他于大约1115年与Gertrud von Northeim结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1150年3月11日在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Salm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erna, Ernst, Erwin, Gunther, Heinz, Johann, Otto, Rainer.

German and Dutch: from Middle High German salm, Dutch zalm ‘salmon’, probably in most cases a topographic or habitational name referring to a house identified by the sign of a salmon, but in some cases an occupational name for a salmon fisher.
German and French (Alsace and Lorraine): habitational name from Salm on the Mosel, or from Salm in Alsace.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck was born on 9 August 1077, in Luxembourg, Belgium, his father, Hermann Ier de Luxembourg, was 36 and his mother, Sophia von Formbach, was 21. He married Gertrud von Northeim about 1115. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 11 March 1150, in Holy Roman Empire, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck est né le 9 août 1077, à Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Hermann Ier de Luxembourg, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Sophia von Formbach, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Gertrud von Northeim environ 1115. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1150, à Saint-Empire romain, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck am 9. August 1077 in Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann Ier de Luxembourg 36 und seine Mutter Sophia von Formbach 21. Er hat um 1115 Gertrud von Northeim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. März 1150 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Heiliges Römisches Reich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck è nato il il 9 agosto 1077 nel Lussemburgo, Belgio, il suo padre, Hermann Ier de Luxembourg, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Sophia von Formbach, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Gertrud von Northeim circa 1115. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 marzo 1150, nel Heiliges Römisches Reich, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineckが1077年8月9日にベルギールクセンボウルグで生まれた時，父Hermann Ier de Luxembourgは36歳，母Sophia von Formbachは21歳であった。約1115年にGertrud von Northeimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1150年3月11日にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck(이)가 1077년 8월 9일 벨기에 루세보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann Ier de Luxembourg(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophia von Formbach(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1115년 Gertrud von Northeim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1150년 3월 11일 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.9 de agosto de 1077–11 de março de 1150: 1077 оны Наймдугаар сарын 9–1150 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 11

pt.9 de agosto de 1077–11 de março de 1150: 9 de agosto de 1077–11 de março de 1150
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck nasceu em 9 de agosto de 1077, em Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Hermann Ier de Luxembourg, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Sophia von Formbach, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrud von Northeim aproximadamente 1115. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1150, em Heiliges Römisches Reich, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck родился 9 августа 1077 г. в местности луксембург, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Hermann Ier de Luxembourg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia von Formbach, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrud von Northeim около 1115 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 марта 1150 г. в местности хилигесь рoмищесь раич в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck nació el 9 de agosto de 1077, en Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Hermann Ier de Luxembourg, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Sophia von Formbach, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Gertrud von Northeim aproximadamente 1115. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1150, en Heiliges Römisches Reich, a la edad de 72 años.
